question: Based on these maps, what can be concluded about the overall level of youth unemployment compared with overall unemployment across U.S. states?

options.A: It cannot be determined from these maps alone
options.B: Both youth and overall unemployment have similar overall levels across states
options.C: Overall unemployment tends to have higher values overall across states
options.D: Youth unemployment tends to have higher values overall across states

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Youth Unemployment has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
